item.description:
Fantasy Premier League reposteó Premier League @premierleague · 2min West London awaits
Will @FulhamFC make it four wins in a row against @BrentfordFC ?
Follow the action to find out! Diapositiva 1 de 2: carrusel De premierleague.com 38 17 90 4 mil

item.title: TheAthleticFC: The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 1min ■ Gabriel vs Saliba vs Guehi vs Dias? ■ Rodri or Rice (or both)? ■ Raya vs
item.description:
The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 1min ■ Gabriel vs Saliba vs Guehi vs Dias? ■ Rodri or Rice (or both)? ■ Raya vs Donnarumma? ■ Does Cherki have to get a spot?
Forget Manchester City vs. Arsenal - what if you created a super team from the two teams battling for the Premier League title?
Seven writers from The Mostrar más 3 1 8 638
